summary: Host service for providing access to LVM2 logical volumes
description: This host service can be used to activate logical volumes
so that they can be accessed from osbuild stages.
The parent volume group is identified via the physical
device which must be passed to this service as parent.
Required host tools: lvchange, pvdisplay, lvdisplay

vg_partnum.description: Partition number on the parent device where the LV's volume group is located
